title: artemisia trifurcata var. tacomensis
intro: Artemisia trifurcata var. tacomensis, commonly known as Tacoma sagewort, is a subspecies of the Artemisia trifurcata plant, a type of shrub in the sunflower family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are derived from its essential oils and sesquiterpenes. The health benefits of Tacoma sagewort include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Tacoma sagewort can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
